onboarding.language_selection:
👋 Hi! Welcome to Auto Tuckshop.

Which language would you like to use?

1️⃣ English
2️⃣ Shona
onboarding.role_selection:
Great 👍

Who are you in the shop?

1️⃣ Shop owner
2️⃣ Shop assistant
3️⃣ Both (I own the shop and sell)
onboarding.assistant_linking_ask:
Got it.

Are you the only one who will use Auto Tuckshop, or should we add another number?

1️⃣ Add another number
2️⃣ Skip for now
onboarding.assistant_linking_skipped: No problem. You can add them later.
onboarding.value_explanation: Auto Tuckshop helps you calculate sales automatically and gives you daily, weekly and monthly summaries — without writing everything down.
onboarding.stock_setup_ask:
To get the best results, you can tell me what you sell and the prices.

Would you like to do that now?

1️⃣ Add stock now
2️⃣ Skip for now
onboarding.stock_setup_prompt:
Please tell me your items like this:

"Sugar 10 at R45, Rice 20 at R60"

You can use voice or text.
onboarding.stock_setup_complete:
Stock saved ✅
You can update this anytime.
onboarding.stock_setup_skipped:
No problem 👍
When you sell, just include the item, quantity and price.
onboarding.sales_instruction:
When you sell, just tell me what was sold.

Example:
'Sold sugar 2 at R45, rice 1 at R60'

You can send one message for many items.
onboarding.onboarding_complete:
You're all set! 🎉

Start recording sales whenever you're ready.

waitlist.welcome:
Welcome! You've been added to our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request and approve your account shortly. We'll send you a message when you're approved.

In the meantime, if you'd like to provide a name for your shop, just send another message with it.
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Thanks! We've noted your shop name as "{shop_name}".

You're still on our waitlist. An administrator will review your request soon.
waitlist.still_pending:
Thanks for your message! You're still on our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request soon. We'll notify you when your account is approved.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, your request to join was not approved. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
waitlist.already_processed: Waitlist entry already processed or not found

approval.welcome:
Welcome to Auto Tuck Shop! Your account has been approved.

Shop: {company}

end_of_day.summary:
📊 Daily Summary:

{summary_details}

(You can continue logging sales. This is just a summary.)

Would you like to receive this summary automatically at the end of each day?

1️⃣ Yes
2️⃣ No
end_of_day.summary_enabled: Great! You'll receive a daily summary automatically.
end_of_day.summary_disabled: No problem. You can always request a summary by saying 'summary' or 'report'.

summary_help.message:
You can request summaries anytime:

• 'summary' or 'done' = Today
• 'weekly summary' or 'week' = This week
• 'monthly summary' or 'month' = This month

audio.download_failed: Sorry, I couldn't download your audio message. Please try sending it again or send a text message instead.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, I couldn't transcribe your audio message. Please try sending a text message instead.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, only shop owners can add assistants. Contact the shop owner if you need to add team members.
assistant.missing_phone: I couldn't find a phone number in your message. Please include the assistant's phone number, e.g., 'add assistant +27821234567'
assistant.already_registered: The phone number {phone} is already registered to another user.

sale.no_products: I couldn't identify any products. Please list items, e.g., "2 cokes, 1 chips"
sale.no_products_audio:
I heard you say "{text}"

I couldn't identify any products. Please list items, e.g., "2 cokes, 1 chips"
sale.missing_prices_note: Note: Some items have no price set. Include prices (e.g. "2x Pear @ 5") to see totals.
sale.already_processed: Sale already processed or not found
